dataset: Odoo 17 Community Edition official HR demo data

pi_items.source: setup_data.py lines 5-10 lists '20 employees' including 'Ernest Reed' from Odoo official demo data; evidence_docs/README.md line 32 confirms 'Ernest Reed | Management / Professional Services | Consultant' exists in demo database

task.json metadata field line 19, task description line 5; this is an arbitrary custom value the agent is expected to set (not from demo data). Odoo allows any free-text value for job_title field. The value follows naming convention consistent with professional titles.

task.json metadata field line 20 and task description line 5; 'Research & Development' is a real department in Odoo's official demo data confirmed in evidence_docs/README.md line 46 ('Total departments: 7') and lines 11-12 of setup_data.py which lists 'Research & Development' as an official demo department

task.json metadata field line 21 and task description line 5; 'Experienced Developer' is a real job position (M2O field) in Odoo's official demo data confirmed in setup_data.py line 13 ('Job Positions: ... Experienced Developer') and evidence_docs/README.md lines 34-45 which list employees with 'Experienced Developer' position

task.json metadata field line 22 and task description line 5; 'Marc Demo' is a real employee in Odoo's official demo data confirmed in setup_data.py line 6, evidence_docs/README.md line 36, and set_employee_manager task.json which uses Marc Demo as a manager

task.json metadata field line 23 and task description line 5; 'Tina Williamson' is a real employee in Odoo's official demo data confirmed in setup_data.py line 7, evidence_docs/README.md line 43, and create_department task.json which uses Tina Williamson as a manager

task.json metadata field line 24 (work_phone_digits); task description line 5 shows '+1 (650) 555-0199' formatted. The digits '6505550199' are the normalized form (non-digits removed) from phone '+1 (650) 555-0199'. This appears to be a placeholder business phone number (uses common pattern 555-XXXX which is reserved in North America for fictional use). Odoo allows any value for work_phone field.

task.json metadata field line 25 and task description line 5; this is a placeholder email format using 'yourcompany.example.com' domain (example.com is IANA-reserved for documentation examples per RFC 2606). Odoo allows any value for work_email field.
task.json description (implicit), env.json configuration, setup_odoo.sh, setup_task.sh line 51 (ensure_firefox URL)

docker-compose.yml specifies 'image: odoo:17'; evidence_docs/README.md line 54 shows Odoo version 17.0-20260217 from server logs

privileged_info_summary: The process_employee_promotion task operates on Odoo 17 Community Edition at http://localhost:8069 with official HR demo data (20 pre-loaded employees, 7 departments, 7 job positions). The task requires updating Ernest Reed's employee record (existing in official demo data, currently: Professional Services department, Consultant position) with new values: job title 'Senior Research Analyst', department 'Research & Development' (real demo department), job position 'Experienced Developer' (real demo position), manager 'Marc Demo' (real employee), coach 'Tina Williamson' (real employee), work phone '+1 (650) 555-0199', and work email 'ernest.reed@yourcompany.example.com'. All department, position, and employee names referenced are verified to exist in Odoo's official demo data. Contact credentials are admin/admin. Task timeout is 480 seconds with max 35 steps.
